zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱，短线关注关键支撑
zh.content:
当前AVAX/USD报价6.5511，24小时上涨1.38%，价格位于日内区间6.4375至6.5979之间。从走势看，币价虽有反弹，但仍运行在阶段性低位区域，短期呈现震荡整理格局。多头尝试修复跌势，但趋势反转信号尚未完全确立。

技术指标方面，20日简单移动均线（SMA20）位于6.5781，当前价格略低于均线，显示中期趋势仍偏谨慎。MACD值为-0.0471，处于零轴下方，反映空头动能仍占优势。由于RSI数据缺失，暂无法确认市场是否处于超买或超卖状态。

关键价位方面，短线支撑位可关注6.44附近，即日内低点区域；若跌破该位置，可能进一步测试6.30一线。上方首个阻力位位于6.60附近，突破后有望挑战6.75至6.80区间。成交量若同步放大，将提高突破有效性。

交易策略上，稳健型投资者可等待价格重新站稳SMA20并突破6.60后再考虑顺势跟进。激进型交易者可依托6.44支撑轻仓试多，但需严格设置止损。整体来看，当前市场仍处于筑底观察阶段，建议控制仓位，关注MACD后续是否形成金叉信号。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is trading at 6.5511, up 1.38% over the last 24 hours, showing modest recovery momentum after testing the session low near 6.4375. However, price remains slightly below the 20-period simple moving average at 6.5781, indicating that the broader short-term trend is still neutral to mildly bearish. The inability to establish a sustained move above the moving average suggests buyers have regained some control but have not yet confirmed a stronger bullish reversal.

From a momentum perspective, the MACD reading of -0.0471 remains below the zero line, reflecting lingering downside pressure from previous sessions. While the absence of a signal-line reading limits confirmation, the negative MACD value indicates bearish momentum has not been fully eliminated. At the same time, the recent positive daily change suggests selling pressure may be easing. The market appears to be in a consolidation phase where traders are evaluating whether a base is forming near current levels.

Key support is located around 6.44, corresponding to the recent intraday low, with a secondary support zone near 6.30 if weakness accelerates. On the upside, immediate resistance sits near the SMA(20) at 6.58, followed by the recent high around 6.60. A decisive break above 6.60 could improve sentiment and open the door toward the 6.80–7.00 region. Conversely, a drop below 6.44 would increase the risk of renewed bearish momentum.

For traders, a cautious approach remains appropriate. Aggressive buyers may consider entries only after a confirmed breakout above 6.60 with rising volume, targeting higher resistance zones while maintaining disciplined stop-loss levels below recent support. Short-term range traders may look for opportunities between 6.44 and 6.60 until a directional move emerges. Given the still-negative MACD structure and price trading near key technical levels, risk management should remain a priority.
